notes: ClawRouter T3 APEX 404 fix. CLAWROUTER-001 failed: MiniMax truncated clawrouter-v2.ts (569 lines) to 1 line — large-file edit failure. Redesigned as proxy server approach: CLAWROUTER-002 creates a NEW small file (scripts/lib/anthropic-proxy-server.ts) that bridges OpenAI-format requests to Anthropic API. No edits to clawrouter-v2.ts needed. Planner set CLAWROUTER_GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:18790/v1 in server .env directly.

tasks.description: Fix ClawRouter T3 APEX 404 — add direct Anthropic API fallback when OpenClaw gateway is unavailable
tasks.context:
BACKGROUND:
The OpenClaw gateway (CLAWROUTER_GATEWAY = http://localhost:18789/v1) returns 404 on POST /chat/completions because port 18789 serves the OpenClaw WebSocket UI, not an LLM proxy. This breaks all constitutional_flag=true calls (T3 APEX = CEO/CTO review phases in the sprint runner).

FIX — modify scripts/lib/clawrouter-v2.ts:

READ THE FILE FIRST: scripts/lib/clawrouter-v2.ts
The callCloudGateway() function is at line ~334. When gateway returns 404 and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set, fall back to direct Anthropic API.
tasks.note: Resolved by CLAWROUTER-002 infrastructure approach. CLAWROUTER_GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:18790/v1 already set in server .env. Proxy server on :18790 handles Anthropic API translation — no changes to clawrouter-v2.ts needed.

tasks.description: Create Anthropic proxy server — NEW file only, no edits to existing files
tasks.note: anthropic-proxy-server.ts delivered at commit 32ffffa (Mar 29). 61 lines, clean TS, OpenAI→Anthropic translation on :18790. PM2 process started on server 2026-03-31 — fully live. ClawRouter T3 APEX CEO/CTO constitutional review calls unblocked.
